title: Nested Nanowell Arrays for High-Throughput Quantitative Analysis of Cytokines from Single Macrophages.
snippet: Macrophages play a critical role in the development of the tumor microenvironment (TME). Recruited macrophages in the TME differentiate into various phenotypes, each with a distinct profile of secreted cytokines. To describe and understand this large heterogeneity, we developed nested nanowell arrays for the multiplexed analysis of secreted proteins at the....
